442.description: Balanced formation with two strikers. This setup provides strong coverage across the width of the pitch.

roles.att: The two Center Forwards (CF) work as a pair to pressure the opposing center-backs and create goal-scoring opportunities.
roles.mid: The four midfielders must stay disciplined to avoid being outnumbered centrally while also supporting wide play.
roles.def: The back four provides a traditional flat defensive line, relying on organization and communication.

433.description: An attacking formation with wingers and a central striker, ideal for high pressing and possession-based play.

roles.att: The front three includes a central striker supported by two wingers who stretch the defense and cut inside.
roles.mid: The midfield trio typically consists of one defensive midfielder and two advanced playmakers.
roles.def: Fullbacks are expected to push forward to provide width while center-backs maintain defensive stability.

4231.description: A versatile and modern formation that balances defensive stability with attacking creativity.

roles.att: The lone striker is supported by three attacking midfielders who create chances and exploit space between lines.
roles.mid: Two defensive midfielders provide protection to the back line and help control possession.
roles.def: The back four remains compact, with fullbacks occasionally joining the attack.

41212.description: A narrow formation that focuses on central play and quick passing combinations.

roles.att: Two strikers work closely together, often playing quick one-twos to break through defenses.
roles.mid: The midfield diamond includes a defensive midfielder, two central midfielders, and an attacking midfielder at the tip.
roles.def: The back four must handle wide pressure since the formation lacks natural width.

532.description: A defensive formation that uses three center-backs and wing-backs for solidity and counter-attacking opportunities.

roles.att: Two strikers stay forward to capitalize on counter-attacks and long balls.
roles.mid: The three midfielders focus on maintaining shape and transitioning quickly from defense to attack.
roles.def: Three center-backs provide strong central coverage, while wing-backs drop deep to form a back five.
